title: Notification de l'OIE
text_preview: Oie The Director General Our Ref. : JLA/RT 24 162 Organisation de la Santé Animale World Organisation for Animal Health Organización Mundial de Sanidad Animal Paris, 25 May 2007 Your Excellency, I have the honour to advise you that I have received a letter from the French Ministry of Foreign Affairs stating the official membership of Fiji to the World Organisation for Animal Health (OIE). I would like to welcome you…

pages.text:
Oie

The Director General

Our Ref. : JLA/RT 24 162

Organisation de la Santé

Animale

World

Organisation

for Animal

Health

Organización

Mundial de Sanidad

Animal

Paris, 25 May 2007

Your Excellency,

I have the honour to advise you that I have received a letter from the French Ministry of

Foreign Affairs stating the official membership of Fiji to the World Organisation for

Animal Health (OIE).

I would like to welcome your country as the 169th Member Country of the OIE.

Please find enclosed the notification of contributive shares due by your country to the functioning of the OIE for 2007.

i have addressed all necessary

information to Dr Joeli Vakabua, which you have

appointed as Permanent Delegate of Fiji to the OIE.

I would like to take this opportunity to reiterate assurances of my highest consideration.

Bernard Vallat

H.E. the Minister of Foreign Affairs

FIDJI

Encl.: - Resolution No V adopted by the OIE International Committee on 26 May 2006 on the amounts corresponding to each contributive category for 2007

- Statement of contribution and Call for contribution for 2007

OFFICE INTERNATIONAL

DES EFIZOOTIES

12. rue de prosy 75017 paris france tel. 33 1011 44 15 1884 fax 331011 42 67 0987.

www.oie.int
